finding: The seed-0 checkpoint is deterministic under a fixed evaluator policy, but quality and timeout metrics change materially when verify_chosen_only and max_attempts change. Historical E135/E138/E139 comparisons were not policy-normalized.
harness_change: Persist effective evaluation_policy in every eval scoreboard.
decision: Use one declared diagnostic policy for future checkpoint comparisons and do not treat the old E135 score as directly comparable until re-evaluated under that policy. Parse and reward remain zero under every replay.
